tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh from project dir reports Context7 MCP configured (54 checks passed).

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: init.sh refused to run inside framework dir, exit code 1, expected message printed (PR #18 verified).

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 steps (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed via --complete-step. Note: runbook lists 'uat_scenarios_drafted', 'phase1_artifacts_complete', 'approval_logged' which are NOT in the actual PHASE1_STEPS array — runbook doc is out of sync with framework.

tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: check-phase-gate.sh reports 'Phase gates consistent.' RC=0 after steps complete.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D regression confirmation: .current_phase remained 0 after phase1 steps complete and check-phase-gate.sh passed. No script in framework auto-advances .current_phase.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after phase1 gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: Complete all 5 phase1_architecture steps via process-checklist.sh --complete-step; run scripts/check-phase-gate.sh (passes); inspect .claude/phase-state.json — .current_phase still 0.
framework_bugs.expected: After phase 1 steps complete and gate passes, some documented script should advance .current_phase to 1 (or to 2 after phase2_init).
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase remains at 0 with no documented advancement path. process-checklist.sh has no --advance-phase or --start-phase2 command; check-phase-gate.sh only reports consistency without writing.

documentation_gaps.gap: Runbook Section B mentions phase1 steps 'uat_scenarios_drafted', 'phase1_artifacts_complete', 'approval_logged' which are not in the actual PHASE1_STEPS array (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized).

tests.name: verify_init_completes_with_lockfile
tests.details: After creating Cargo.lock, scripts/process-checklist.sh --verify-init auto-marked branch_protection_configured (NOTE: actually marked despite check-gate.sh --preflight failing — auto-mark logic may be too lenient), project_scaffolded, pre_commit_hooks_installed.

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit succeeded after all 5 build steps complete; commit message 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' accepted.

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero_via_framework_path
tests.details: Invoking via $FRAMEWORK/scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc returned RC=1 with 'Error: PROJECT_INTAKE.md not found. Run this script from a Solo Orchestrator project directory.' This is U-G regression confirmation — PROJECT_ROOT is set from SCRIPT_DIR/../, ignoring CWD.

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero_via_project_path_target_private_poc
tests.details: Invoking via project-local scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc returned RC=1: '[FAIL] Invalid target deployment: private_poc (must be: personal, organizational)'. The wizard maps --upgrade-deployment to upgrade-project.sh --deployment, but --deployment only accepts personal|organizational. There is NO documented path for personal -> private_poc transition (which requires deployment=organizational + poc_mode=private_poc).

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero_workaround_organizational
tests.details: Closest workaround: scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment organizational. Main upgrade reported success ('Upgrade Complete') but final RC=1 due to a `cp` step at end that copies pending-approval.sh from project's own scripts/ to itself: 'cp: scripts/pending-approval.sh and .../scripts/pending-approval.sh are identical (not copied).' This is a NEW BUG in upgrade-project.sh's helper-refresh block.

tests.name: deployment_field_written_to_phase_state
tests.details: U-J confirmation: After successful 'personal -> organizational' upgrade, .claude/phase-state.json still contains 'deployment: personal' and 'poc_mode: null'. Only 'last_upgrade: 2026-04-25' field was added. The upgrade banner reports new deployment correctly but phase-state.json is not updated.

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected_via_project_path
tests.details: With .claude/pending-approval.json present, project-local scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc was blocked: '[FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision' before falling through to validation. PR #17 U-F fix confirmed for project-local path.

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected_via_framework_path
tests.details: Via $FRAMEWORK/scripts/intake-wizard.sh path, sentinel is never checked because U-G aborts execution at PROJECT_INTAKE.md lookup before reaching sentinel-check logic.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh header contains BL-006 (2026-04-24) and BL-015 (2026-04-25) and BL-016 (2026-04-25) changelog entries.

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep '__PROJECT_NAME__|__PLATFORM__|__LANGUAGE__|__TRACK__' against full upgrade output returned no matches.

framework_bugs.summary: U-G confirmation: intake-wizard.sh PROJECT_ROOT hardcoded to SCRIPT_DIR/..
framework_bugs.reproduction: From a project directory containing PROJECT_INTAKE.md, run: bash $FRAMEWORK/scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc
framework_bugs.expected: Wizard should resolve PROJECT_ROOT from CWD (the project) so the framework copy can be invoked from any project directory.
framework_bugs.actual: scripts/intake-wizard.sh:21 hardcodes PROJECT_ROOT=$(cd $SCRIPT_DIR/..) which resolves to the framework directory itself. Wizard prints 'Error: PROJECT_INTAKE.md not found.' and exits 1. Inline comment at scripts/intake-wizard.sh:17-18 acknowledges U-G is deferred.

framework_bugs.summary: U-J confirmation: deployment field not written to phase-state.json on upgrade
framework_bugs.reproduction: From a personal-deployment project, run: bash scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment organizational. After successful upgrade, inspect .claude/phase-state.json.
framework_bugs.expected: .deployment field should be 'organizational' (the new value) after a deployment upgrade.
framework_bugs.actual: .deployment remains 'personal'. Only 'last_upgrade' field is added. CLAUDE.md, PROJECT_INTAKE.md, APPROVAL_LOG.md, and tool-preferences.json are updated correctly, but phase-state.json's deployment field is stale.

framework_bugs.summary: intake-wizard --upgrade-deployment cannot target POC modes (private_poc, sponsored_poc)
framework_bugs.reproduction: From a personal project, run: bash scripts/intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc
framework_bugs.expected: Wizard should accept POC mode targets (private_poc, sponsored_poc) and translate to deployment=organizational + poc_mode=<target> via upgrade-project.sh.
framework_bugs.actual: Wizard at scripts/intake-wizard.sh:1590 directly forwards $2 to 'upgrade-project.sh --deployment $2'. upgrade-project.sh --deployment only accepts personal|organizational, so private_poc/sponsored_poc fail validation: '[FAIL] Invalid target deployment: private_poc'. There is no documented or supported path for personal -> private_poc.

framework_bugs.summary: upgrade-project.sh helper-refresh cp-to-self produces RC=1 on success
framework_bugs.reproduction: From a project initialized via init.sh (so scripts/pending-approval.sh already exists locally), run any upgrade-project.sh path. The final 'Refreshing framework helper scripts (BL-009, BL-015)' step issues 'cp: scripts/pending-approval.sh and <project>/scripts/pending-approval.sh are identical (not copied).' and the script exits non-zero despite successful upgrade.
framework_bugs.expected: Helper-refresh step should detect identical-source-and-destination and skip silently, or compute source path from $FRAMEWORK and not from the project's scripts dir; final RC should be 0 on a successful upgrade.
framework_bugs.actual: Final exit code is 1; user sees 'Upgrade Complete' banner immediately followed by an error and non-zero exit, which is confusing and breaks any caller relying on RC=0.

documentation_gaps.gap: Runbook Section F directs use of `intake-wizard.sh --upgrade-deployment private_poc` but no framework script supports this transition. Either upgrade-project.sh needs --to-private-poc or intake-wizard.sh should translate the value to deployment=organizational + poc_mode=private_poc.
documentation_gaps.where: Reports/uat-2026-04-26/RUNBOOK.md Section F lines 287-294; scripts/intake-wizard.sh:1584-1594; scripts/upgrade-project.sh:76-82

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: grep for password|api_key|secret|token in workdir only matched documentation references in evaluation-prompts/Projects/ (cloned framework files, expected). No real secrets found.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: .claude/process-audit.log absent; no FORCE/reset events occurred (N/A per runbook guidance).

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short returned only '?? .claude/' and '?? Reports/uat-2026-04-26/' (untracked, expected). HEAD unchanged at d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494. Framework-self guard from PR #18 verified working.

summary: Baseline init (personal/desktop/full/rust) and Phase 2 feature recording succeeded; Section F upgrade-deployment to private_poc is fundamentally unsupported (High bug) and exposed two prior-sweep regressions (U-G PROJECT_ROOT, U-J deployment field) plus a new RC=1-on-success cp-to-self bug; framework not contaminated.
